feedback.details: Diagram validates with mmdc (exit 0). Contains explicit container IDs (postgresql-db line 16, qdrant-kb line 17, llm-switch-api line 21) and 10 directed relationships with protocols/ports (postgresql://:5432, grpc://:6334, http://:8500, https://:8200). Minor issue: Lines 33-36 contain bidirectional relationships between llm-switch-api and consul/vault that may be redundant representations of single communication paths.

All 4 required containers present (postgresql-db, qdrant-kb, llm-switch-api, nomad-executor). Security zones annotated (Database Tier VPC-private line 15, Application Tier line 20). Consul service discovery (lines 25, 33, 35) and Vault secret injection (lines 26, 34, 36) shown. Missing explicit firewall boundary between Database Tier and Application Tier boundaries.

Traceability table present (lines 47-56) mapping PRD Sections 3.2 and 3.3 to diagram elements. pgvector HNSW indexing documented (line 49). Qdrant payload schema documented with fields embedding_vector, created_at, conversation_id (line 49). Minor gap: Could include explicit line references to Mermaid diagram element IDs for traceability verification.

Sequence diagram present (lines 59-87) covering: (1) LLM→Qdrant upsert with conversation_id:timestamp point ID (line 69), (2) PostgreSQL transaction with advisory lock (line 74), (3) Consul health check 30s interval (line 79), (4) Vault credential retrieval 15m TTL (line 84). Gap: Sequence diagram does not visually distinguish between synchronous and asynchronous message flows (all use solid arrows).

CRITICAL MD013 violations: Line 43 is 921 chars (exceeds 120), line 49 is 275 chars, lines 50-55 range from 173-212 chars. 20+ lines exceed the 120-character limit. MD031 violation: Blank line 111 exists between list items (line 110 and 112). Code fence specifiers correct (mermaid lines 11, 59). No inline HTML (MD033 satisfied). MD001 satisfied (single H1 at line 1).

Flyway versioning (V001__) documented with rollback procedures via U001__undo.sql format (lines 92-93). PostgreSQL advisory locks (pg_try_advisory_xact_lock) documented (line 94). Qdrant collection schema versioning via aliases documented (line 98). Catastrophic rollback procedure for dimension mismatch mentioned (line 100) but lacks explicit step-by-step rollback sequence or example HCL for traffic shift.

TLS 1.3 documented (line 105). pg_hba.conf restrictions for Nomad executor IPs (line 115). Vault pg_userpass mount documented (line 109). Connection pool limits present (max_connections=100, pool_timeout=30s at lines 113-114). RBAC for vector embeddings documented (line 116: read/write separation). Missing: Explicit mention of certificate verification settings or CA trust chain configuration for TLS 1.3.

overall_summary: The database/c2-container.md document demonstrates solid C4 modeling with valid Mermaid syntax and comprehensive architectural coverage. However, it catastrophically fails Markdown Format Compliance (3.0/10) due to severe MD013 violations with 20+ lines exceeding the 120-character limit (line 43 is 921 characters). Schema Evolution Strategy lacks explicit step-by-step rollback procedures for dimension mismatches. Data Flow Specification uses uniform arrow styles without distinguishing synchronous from asynchronous flows. All criteria thresholds are 10.0, and the document fails all of them. Immediate remediation required: truncate long lines, add MD031-compliant list formatting, and enhance Schema Evolution with explicit rollback sequences.
